seoTitle: Squarespace Gallery Page: Setup and Best Practices
metaDescription: Learn how to create and customize a Gallery Page in Squarespace to showcase images beautifully for portfolios, businesses, or e-commerce sites.
intro: A Gallery Page is one of Squarespace's most useful tools for showcasing images in a clean, customizable layout, whether you're a photographer, artist, or business owner. This tutorial walks through creating a gallery, exploring display options, and optimizing images so your visuals load fast and look sharp.

steps.heading: Create a new Gallery Page
steps.body: Add a Gallery Page to your Squarespace site as the foundation for displaying your images.

steps.heading: Explore display options
steps.body: Review the different gallery layout styles available so you can pick the one that best fits your content, whether that's a grid, slideshow, or carousel style.

steps.heading: Optimize images for performance
steps.body: Resize and compress your images before uploading to keep the gallery loading quickly without losing visual quality.

steps.heading: Integrate with other pages and features
steps.body: Connect your gallery to other parts of your site, such as linking from your homepage or portfolio navigation, to streamline the visitor's browsing path.

steps.heading: Maintain consistency for a professional look
steps.body: Follow consistent sizing, cropping, and styling across your gallery images to keep your portfolio looking polished.

faq.question: What display options are available for a Squarespace gallery?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers different display options so you can choose a layout that suits your content, such as grid or slideshow-style presentations.

faq.question: Do I need to manually resize every image?
faq.answer: Optimizing images before upload is recommended for better performance, and the tutorial shares tips for doing this efficiently.

faq.question: Can a Gallery Page work for an online store?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial notes it's useful for e-commerce sites as well as photographers and artists showcasing a portfolio.

faq.question: Can I update the gallery without editing everything manually?
faq.answer: The video touches on automation that allows gallery updates with minimal manual effort.

faq.question: Is this feature beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it's designed to be accessible even for those unfamiliar with web design.
